mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS scheduleId, s.movie_id AS movieId, s.hall_id AS hallId, h.name AS hallName, h.cinema_id AS cinemaId, s.start_time AS startTime, s.end_time AS endTime, s.price AS price, s.status AS status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_schedule ss WHERE ss.schedule_id = s.id) AS remainSeats FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN hall h ON s.hall_id = h.id WHERE s.movie_id = #{movieId} AND DATE(s.start_time) = #{date} ORDER BY s.start_time ASC

SELECT s.id AS scheduleId, s.movie_id AS movieId, s.hall_id AS hallId, h.name AS hallName, h.cinema_id AS cinemaId, s.start_time AS startTime, s.end_time AS endTime, s.price AS price, s.status AS status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_schedule ss WHERE ss.schedule_id = s.id) AS remainSeats FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN hall h ON s.hall_id = h.id WHERE DATE(s.start_time) = #{date} ORDER BY s.movie_id, s.start_time ASC

SELECT s.id AS scheduleId, s.movie_id AS movieId, s.hall_id AS hallId, h.name AS hallName, h.cinema_id AS cinemaId, s.start_time AS startTime, s.end_time AS endTime, s.price AS price, s.status AS status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM seat_schedule ss WHERE ss.schedule_id = s.id) AS remainSeats FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN hall h ON s.hall_id = h.id WHERE s.movie_id = #{movieId} AND s.start_time >= NOW() ORDER BY s.start_time ASC

SELECT DISTINCT c.id, c.name, c.address, c.phone FROM schedule s INNER JOIN hall h ON s.hall_id = h.id INNER JOIN cinema c ON h.cinema_id = c.id WHERE s.movie_id = #{movieId} AND DATE(s.start_time) = #{date} ORDER BY c.name ASC

SELECT -- 排片基础字段 s.id, s.movie_id, s.hall_id, s.start_time, s.end_time, s.price, s.status, -- 影厅名称 h.name AS hall_name, m.id AS movie_id, m.title AS movie_title, m.poster AS movie_poster, m.duration AS movie_duration, c.id AS cinema_id, c.name AS cinema_name FROM schedule s INNER JOIN hall h ON s.hall_id = h.id INNER JOIN cinema c ON h.cinema_id = c.id LEFT JOIN movie m ON s.movie_id = m.id WHERE s.movie_id = #{movieId} AND c.id = #{cinemaId} AND DATE(s.start_time) = #{date} AND c.status = 1 -- 影院营业中 AND h.status = 1 -- 影厅可用 ORDER BY s.start_time ASC
